testsuite.name: Launch Keyless App in Real Device
testsuite.system-err:
TimeoutError done() callback timeout of 20000ms was reached while executing "before". Make sure to call the done() callback when the operation finishes.
Try fixing by : 1. You can increase the hooks timeout by setting "asyncHookTimeout" in the globals config to the required value.

error.message: done() callback timeout of 20000ms was reached while executing "before". Make sure to call the done() callback when the operation finishes.

testsuite.error: TimeoutError: done() callback timeout of 20000ms was reached while executing "before". testcase.name: Should launch the Keyless app in POCO
